options.systemMessage:
=You are a Senior QA Consultant preparing a client-facing executive website testing report.

Analyze the provided website scan JSON and return ONLY a valid JSON object that strictly matches the required output schema.


Determine healthStatus using the following mapping:

90-100 = Excellent
70-89 = Good
50-69 = Fair
0-49 = Needs Attention

This is the ONLY value you are allowed to derive from the input data.
All other metrics must be used exactly as provided.

RULES:

1. Return ONLY valid JSON.
2. Do NOT return Markdown.
3. Do NOT return code blocks.
4. Do NOT add any fields outside the schema.
5. Populate every required field.
6. ONLY use information explicitly present in the input JSON.
7. NEVER assume or invent:
   - Security issues
   - SEO issues
   - Accessibility issues
   - Performance issues
   - Root causes
   - Revenue impact
   - Technologies used
8. Never use speculative words such as:
   - likely
   - probably
   - appears
   - suggests
   - may indicate
9. Use all provided metrics exactly as they are.
10. Do not calculate any scores, percentages, or metrics except healthStatus and totalIssues.
11. Use the provided healthScore and healthStatus values directly.
12. If information is unavailable:
    - For string fields use:
      "Not enough data to determine."
    - For arrays use:
      []
13. Business impacts and recommendations must remain generic and be based only on the scan findings.

Special Rules:

- If accessibilityIssueCount = 0 AND imagesWithoutAltCount = 0:
  accessibilityFindings =
  "No accessibility issues were detected during this scan."

- If slowPages is empty:
  performanceFindings =
  "No slow-performing pages were detected during this scan."

- Use topAffectedPages exactly as provided.

Return ONLY the JSON object matching the schema.

parameters.subject: =Automated Website Testing Report - {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Enter the website url '] }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Enter Your Name/Company Name'] }},

Your automated website quality assurance scan has been completed successfully.

Summary:
• Website: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Enter the website url '] }}
• Health Score: {{ $('Create an AI summary').first().json.output.overallWebsiteHealth.healthScore }}/100
• Status: Needs Attention
• Pages Scanned: {{ $('Create an AI summary').first().json.output.websiteInformation.pagesScanned }}
• Total Issues Found: {{ $('Create an AI summary').first().json.output.issueBreakdown.totalIssues }}

Attachments Included:
1. Executive_Summary.html
   → Management-friendly overview and recommendations.

2. QA_Browser_Agent_Report_{{ $('Assign a Scan ID').item.json.scanId }}.zip
   → Google drive link : {{ $('Upload file').item.json.webViewLink }}
Please review the findings and recommendations in the attached reports.

Regards,
QA Browser Agent
Automated Website Testing Platform

parameters.jsCode:
const report = $json.output; const html = `

Executive Quality Assurance Summary

Generated by QA Browser Agent

Website Information

Website: ${report.websiteInformation.websiteUrl}

Scan Date: ${new Date(report.websiteInformation.scanDate).toLocaleString()}

Pages Scanned: ${report.websiteInformation.pagesScanned}

Overall Website Health

${report.overallWebsiteHealth.healthScore}/100

Health Score

${report.overallWebsiteHealth.healthStatus}

Issue Breakdown

${report.issueBreakdown.critical}

Critical

${report.issueBreakdown.high}

High

${report.issueBreakdown.medium}

Medium

${report.issueBreakdown.low}

Low

Most Affected Pages

${report.mostAffectedPages.map(page=>` `).join('')}
URL Issues
${page.url} ${page.issuesCount}

Accessibility Findings

${report.accessibilityFindings}

Performance Findings

${report.performanceFindings}

Business Impact

    ${report.businessImpact.map(i=>`
  • ${i}
    • `).join('')}

Recommended Actions

    ${report.recommendedActions.map(i=>`
  • ${i}
    • `).join('')}

Priority Roadmap

Immediate
    ${report.priorityRoadmap.immediate.map(i=>`
  • ${i}
    • `).join('')}
Short-Term
    ${report.priorityRoadmap.shortTerm.map(i=>`
  • ${i}
    • `).join('')}
Long-Term
    ${report.priorityRoadmap.longTerm.map(i=>`
  • ${i}
    • `).join('')}

Conclusion

${report.conclusion}

Generated automatically by QA Browser Agent
`; return [{ json:{}, binary:{ executiveReport: await this.helpers.prepareBinaryData( Buffer.from(html), 'Executive_Summary.html', 'text/html' ) } }];
